name: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: TCP or UDP Port 0
notes: This Building Block identifies suspicious flows using port 0.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: TCP or UDP Port 0 on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the IP protocol is one of the following UDP, TCP
when the source or destination port is any of 0
